title: Spiti Valley
content: Spiti is a high-altitude region of the Himalayas, located in the north-eastern part of the northern Indian state of Himachal Pradesh. The name "Spiti" means "The middle land", i.e. the land between Tibet in China and India.

title: Gemini at work!!
content: Gemini empowers you to be more productive by acting as your coding agent. It can plan and execute tasks, freeing you to focus on what matters most.
